description: Design a 2D wireframe of a 3-bay Warren truss in SolveSpace consisting of 11 segments: 3 horizontal segments on the bottom chord, 2 horizontal segments on the top chord, and 6 diagonal web members connecting the 4 bottom nodes and 3 top nodes in a zig-zag pattern. The leftmost node must be coincident with the origin. All 11 segments must be constrained to equal length, with one segment set to exactly 50 mm. Save the fully constrained sketch to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/warren_truss.slvs.
